name: 女神氪金系统
short_description: This is a "special" development adventure game performed by real people. Players play the role of "codenames" in the end times. It is up to the players to decide whether they can finally get the beauty or continue to fall into depravity through their own choices.
detailed_description:
Storyline

No bloodline, no name, codename ZY131385, welcome to "Goddess Krypton Gold System"

Don't you want to escape from this world?

This is the opportunity, the three of them are candidates, each representing a unique world system.

——————————————————————————————————————————————————

World No. 1 - Campus goddess, gentle and sweet, childhood sweetheart: Jin Meng

              

Jin Meng: Brother, can we be together forever?

World No. 2 - Lively and cute, quirky, roommate: Mu Qingqing

              

Mu Qingqing: Ah ah ~

World No. 3 - Mature and sexy, hot-tempered, overbearing boss: Shui Yihan

              

Shui Yihan: I don't regret meeting you

————————————————————————————————————————————————————

You can choose anyone at random, experience a new life, and stay in the new world.

Gameplay

Traditional options: Players will encounter various simple and complex choices in the plot, and these choices will have different plots.

Schedule: If you want to travel to the world of goddesses and have an exclusive date with them, you need to arrange your daily routine every day to improve your attributes and the favorability of the goddesses until the goddess confesses to you.

Goddess Krypton Gold System: A major feature of this game, players will get points in the game, and use the points to redeem krypton gold props in the system. The correct props can continue to advance the plot.

About us

Friends, long time no see!

We are the production team of "Goddess Defense War", and this is the second interactive film and television work we have tried.

After experiencing the first pure love work, we decided to make a different and special game.

This work is deliberately shot in the form of retro vlogs, allowing players to experience the purest Japanese dating and development game.

Thank you for your strong support, and the krypton gold support from the crowdfunding bosses!

We will continue to work hard to make more interactive film and television works with different experiences in the future.

So let's enter the "Goddess Krypton Gold System"!

supported_languages:
Simplified Chinese*, Korean, English
*languages with full audio support
